_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 10 nM NRG-1β producing the greatest enhancement of B76 migration...NRG-1α did affect the migration of A202 and B76 cells, producing statistically significant decreases in the migration
details: NRG-1β at 10 nM produced greatest enhancement of migration, while NRG-1α caused statistically significant inhibition in a biphasic pattern
